info.title: core-be API
info.description:
Backend API for the Core platform. Includes authentication, multi-tenant organization management, billing, notifications, webhooks, and admin operations.

All authenticated endpoints require a Bearer JWT token in the Authorization header. Organization-scoped endpoints also require the appropriate permission.

tags.MCP: Model Context Protocol — tools and resources for agents (requires admin JWT when ENABLE_MCP_SERVER=true)
tags.Magic Link: Passwordless authentication via magic link emails
tags.Session: Session management — list and revoke active sessions
tags.Auth Method: Manage linked authentication methods (password, OAuth, etc.)
tags.User Settings: User personal settings (dark mode, language, etc.)
tags.Notification Preferences: Per-user notification type and channel preferences
tags.User Management: Admin user management — list, update, suspend, delete users
tags.Audit Log: Audit trail of actions performed in the organization
tags.Invitation: Member invitations — create, accept, decline, resend
tags.Permission: Available permissions that can be assigned to roles
tags.Subscription: Subscription lifecycle — create, upgrade, cancel, resume
tags.Webhook: Webhook endpoint management and delivery history
tags.Upload: Pre-signed URL generation for file uploads

components.bearerAuthDescription: JWT access token obtained from the login or token refresh endpoint.
